executives.name: Caroline Dorsa
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated.

executives.name: Frances Arnold
executives.background: Frances H. Arnold has been a director since 2019. She is the Linus Pauling Professor of Chemical Engineering, Bioengineering and Biochemistry at the California Institute of Technology and a Nobel Laureate in Chemistry.

executives.name: Jay Flatley
executives.background: Mr. Flatley has served as a member of our Board since 2021. He is the former Chairman and CEO of Illumina, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: President and CEO (1999–2016), Executive Chairman (2016–2019), Chairman of the Board (2019–2021)
